title: Cinemacraft
description: A cinematic pack for creating stunning movie shots in Minecraft. Designed not for creating short videos, but full-blown, cinematic pieces of art.
body:
# Cinemacraft
Cinemacraft is a set of mods, resource packs and shaders made with love for Minecraft cinematography. Designed to provide the user with amazing out-of-the-box moviemaking experience, without altering the vanilla gameplay.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/J99zetIJZw8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## User freedom
You don't like some of the packs included? Just disable them. You prefer Flashback over Replay mod? Got you covered, both of them are installed, just like Axiom alongside WorldEdit for building and modifying the sets. Nearly all features can be easily toggled or configured.

## Shortened list of mods & packs:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-E0xgIz2Ah0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Hope you like it, I spent a long time on it <3

## Credits
- [Bushy Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-bushy-leaves)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions)
- [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)
